arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer stance revealed after fresh injury blow
arts.sum: "We signed Andres Garcia because, as well, he is a young player with the potential he can show he's working with us, I think, 10 days more or less, and he's he's training very well, and Kosta, I spoke about him, and our decision is done," Emery explained when asked if Nedeljkovic will be kept in the squad after Cashs's injury. Nedeljkovic, meanwhile, is expected to depart on loan in the final three days of the winter window after Villa signed 21-year-old right-back Andres Garcia from Levante for £6m last month.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery's guilt tactic earns praise as Arsenal's Ollie Watkins transfer move in tatters
arts.sum: Unai Emery has earned praise for how he's spoken about Ollie Watkins' future as Arsenal look to tempt the striker to the Emirates, only for their approaches to have been rebuffed

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Wolves vs Aston Villa kicks off at 5.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 5pm. Wolves are back at Molineux this Saturday evening as Vitor Pereira's side host Aston Villa under the lights in the Premier League - find out how to follow the live action below.

arts.ttl: Wolves have ‘made an offer’ for midfielder – Pereira’s side awaiting response
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers continue their efforts to try and strengthen their squad before the winter market closes on Monday. The Premier League club seem to be working on several fronts and one of them leads to AS Monaco’s Soungoutou Magassa. arts.sum: According to a report from Foot Mercato, Wolverhampton Wanderers FC are the frontrunners to sign Kevin Danso (26) from RC Lens and win the race for the highly valued Austrian…

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Marcus Rashford closing in on shock Aston Villa loan switch as he heads for Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been pushing to leave Manchester United for much of the January transfer window and the England star is now finally closing in on an exit from Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Wolves submit offer for Monaco’s Soungoutou Magassa
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have submitted an offer for AS Monaco midfielder Soungoutou Magassa (21), according to a report from Foot Mercato. Magassa has been used as a rotation option at Monaco over…

arts.ttl: Friday offer to snatch Aston Villa player from rival’s clutches – Player’s head turned
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s Kosta Nedeljković has seen his playing time limited this season and has clocked in 341 minutes from nine games in all competitions. The right-back featured in Aston Villa’s FA Cup win over West Ham United and that’s been his only appearance for over a month. arts.ttl: Wolves vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves welcome Aston Villa to Molineux this evening in a local grudge match. Vitor Pereira’s team are aiming to avoid a fifth straight Premier League defeat against their Midlands rivals. Wolves dropped into the relegation places last weekend, following a 1-0 defeat to Arsenal on home soil.
